rankings.title: Snap’s GPU-Accelerated Secret to Processing 10 Petabytes a Day | NVIDIA AI Podcast Ep. 298
summary_bullets: Processes 10+ petabytes daily for experiments.
Migrated Spark jobs to GPUs with zero code changes.
